## Checklist
- [ ] New ID follows `LLM-ATTK-GGNN` (`GG` = group, `NN` = next free number in that group). Existing IDs unchanged.
- [ ] Row is in the correct `## Group` table.
- [ ] Framework mappings use real, verified IDs (or `—` where none applies).
- [ ] At least one **primary-source** reference with a working URL.
- [ ] Vendor-neutral and defensively framed (no product pitches, no operational exploit code).
- [ ] Description is one technique, one line; not a duplicate of an existing entry.
- [ ] If a reference URL is already cited elsewhere, the repeat is plain text (the catalog avoids duplicate links).
